members.name: GetStageBytecode
members.summary: Equivalent to getting one of [member bytecode_compute], [member bytecode_fragment], [member bytecode_tesselation_control], [member bytecode_tesselation_evaluation], [member bytecode_vertex].

members.name: GetStageCompileError
members.summary: Returns the compilation error message for the given shader [param stage]. Equivalent to getting one of [member compile_error_compute], [member compile_error_fragment], [member compile_error_tesselation_control], [member compile_error_tesselation_evaluation], [member compile_error_vertex].

members.name: SetStageBytecode
members.signature: public void SetStageBytecode(int stage, PackedByteArray bytecode)
members.summary: Sets the SPIR-V [param bytecode] for the given shader [param stage]. Equivalent to setting one of [member bytecode_compute], [member bytecode_fragment], [member bytecode_tesselation_control], [member bytecode_tesselation_evaluation], [member bytecode_vertex].

members.name: SetStageCompileError
members.signature: public void SetStageCompileError(int stage, String compileError)
members.summary: Sets the compilation error message for the given shader [param stage] to [param compile_error]. Equivalent to setting one of [member compile_error_compute], [member compile_error_fragment], [member compile_error_tesselation_control], [member compile_error_tesselation_evaluation], [member compile_error_vertex].

members.name: BytecodeAnyHit
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the any hit shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeClosestHit
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the closest hit shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeCompute
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the compute shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeFragment
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the fragment shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeIntersection
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the intersection shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeMiss
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the miss shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeRaygen
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the ray generation shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeTesselationControl
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the tessellation control shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeTesselationEvaluation
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the tessellation evaluation shader stage.

members.name: BytecodeVertex
members.summary: The SPIR-V bytecode for the vertex shader stage.

members.name: CompileErrorAnyHit
members.summary: The compilation error message for the any hit shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorClosestHit
members.summary: The compilation error message for the closest hit shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorCompute
members.summary: The compilation error message for the compute shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorFragment
members.summary: The compilation error message for the fragment shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorIntersection
members.summary: The compilation error message for the intersection shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorMiss
members.summary: The compilation error message for the miss shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorRaygen
members.summary: The compilation error message for the ray generation shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorTesselationControl
members.summary: The compilation error message for the tessellation control shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorTesselationEvaluation
members.summary: The compilation error message for the tessellation evaluation shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.

members.name: CompileErrorVertex
members.summary: The compilation error message for the vertex shader stage (set by the SPIR-V compiler and Godot). If empty, shader compilation was successful.
